Why parents ❤️ Léman Events

  • Curated by real humans — not automated listings
  • Save time finding the best activities
  • Updated regularly with new events
  • Designed specifically for families around Lake Geneva

Instead of browsing dozens of websites, find everything in one place.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Still have more questions ? Send us an email at hello@leman.events and we'll answer them as soon as possible

Is checkout secure ?

Yes. We use Stripe, a globally trusted payment processor.
Your payment details are never stored on our servers.

Can I cancel my subscription anytime ?

Yes. You can cancel at any time from your account page.
Your membership will remain active until the end of the current billing period.

Will my yearly subscription renew automatically?

No. The yearly membership does not renew automatically.
Before it expires, we will send you a reminder so you can decide if you want to renew.

Why is there a subscription fee?

All activities we list are publicly available online — but finding them takes time.
Our team manually researches, selects, and organizes the best events so you don’t have to spend hours searching.
Your membership supports:
* continuous updates
* new platform features
* improving the experience for families

Spend less time searching

and more time enjoying activities with your kids

Start your free 14-day trial today
